SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT (the "SPA")

This Share Purchase Agreement is made on this 15th day of October, 2023, by and between:

SELLER: Mr. John Tan, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 78 Emerald Hill, Singapore 229374, Email: john.tan@example.sg, Phone: +65 9123 4567.

PURCHASER: Ms. Lisa Wong, NRIC No. S8765432C, residing at 112 Bukit Timah Road, Singapore 229835, Email: lisa.wong@business.sg, Phone: +65 9876 5432.

COMPANY: Alpha Dynamics Pte. Ltd., a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN: 200312345R, having its registered office at 5 Shenton Way, Singapore 068808.

WHEREAS, the Seller agrees to sell and the Purchaser agrees to purchase 10,000 shares of Alpha Dynamics Pte. Ltd. for a total purchase price of SGD 500,000.

Note that this Agreement does not include any project plan or project status, as it strictly pertains to the transfer of shares.

For identification purposes, further information can be found at https://example.sg/user/S2345678B.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this SPA as of the date first above written.
